hero.title: Academy
hero.subtitle: Your future begins here. Explore our world-class programs, vibrant community, and ignite your potential in an environment designed for innovators.

computerScience.title: Computer Science
computerScience.desc: Software engineering, AI, and systems design computing.

business.title: Business & Innovation
business.desc: Global markets, entrepreneurship, and management strategies.

arts.title: Arts & Humanities
arts.desc: History, literature, philosophy, and creative expression.

medicine.title: Medicine & Health
medicine.desc: Clinical research, public health, and pre-med.

footer.description: A prestigious university dedicated to developing the next generation of global leaders, thinkers, and creators.

registration.title: Registration of Interest
registration.subtitle: Join our community and take the first step towards your professional future today.
registration.disclaimer: This is only a registration of interest, not a commitment to enroll.
registration.success: Thank you for your interest! We will get in touch with you soon.
registration.error: There was an error processing your request. Please try again.

academic.title: Academic Excellence
academic.p1: At Aseder, we take pride in offering a rigorous and updated curriculum that meets real-world demands. Our faculty are experts in their fields and are committed to your professional success.
academic.p2: We believe in active learning where theory meets practice in state-of-the-art labs and collaborative projects. Here you don't just learn, you create and transform.
academic.p3: Our faculties are designed to foster curiosity and innovation, providing students with the resources needed to research and lead significant changes in society.

career.title: Your Professional Future
career.p1: The transition to the workspace is a fundamental pillar of our training. We have strategic alliances with major industry companies to ensure high-impact professional internships.
career.p2: Our graduates are recognized for their technical ability and leadership skills. 95% of our students secure employment in their field within 6 months of graduation.
career.p3: We offer personalized career advice, exclusive job fairs, and access to a global alumni network that will open doors in any market in the world.

life.title: Student Life
life.p1: The university experience goes beyond the classroom. In our vibrant campus, you will find clubs, sports, and cultural activities that will enrich your personal and social growth.
life.p2: We foster a diverse and inclusive community where every voice counts. Participate in international seminars, entrepreneurship events, and research groups from your first semester.

portal.title: Educational Portal
portal.loginNotice: You must log in to access the educational portal.
portal.welcome: Welcome to the institutional portal. Here you can access your academic resources, grades, and administrative procedures.
